name: Noodle Nests
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease cookie sheet.
2. Pour noodles into a bowl.
3. Melt marshmallows and butter in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring until smooth.
4. Pour the marshmallow mixture over the noodles and stir until well coated.
5. Rub butter on your hands and form the noodle mixture into five round balls.
6. Place the balls on the cookie sheet.
7. With the back of a spoon, press each ball to make a hollow nest.
8. Let nests firm up, then fill each with jelly beans.
Suggested age level: 6 thru adult, but I don't see why a younger child couldn't help with the non-cooking part.
